initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(posts.OwnerUserId) AS post_count, COUNT(comments.UserId) AS comment_count
FROM users
LEFT JOIN posts ON posts.OwnerUserId = users.Id
LEFT JOIN comments ON comments.UserId = users.Id
GROUP BY users.Id
ORDER BY users.CreationDate DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    COUNT(p.OwnerUserId) AS post_count,
    COUNT(c.UserId) AS comment_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN posts p ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
LEFT JOIN comments c ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE u.Id = (
    SELECT Id 
    FROM users 
    ORDER BY CreationDate DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT COUNT(posts.OwnerUserId) AS post_count, COUNT(comments.UserId) AS comment_count
FROM users
LEFT JOIN posts ON posts.OwnerUserId = users.Id
LEFT JOIN comments ON comments.UserId = users.Id
WHERE users.Id = (
    SELECT Id 
    FROM users 
    ORDER BY CreationDate DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT 
  COUNT(posts.OwnerUserId) AS post_count, 
  COUNT(comments.UserId) AS comment_count
FROM users
LEFT JOIN posts ON posts.OwnerUserId = users.Id
LEFT JOIN comments ON comments.UserId = users.Id
WHERE users.Id = (
  SELECT Id 
  FROM users 
  ORDER BY CreationDate DESC 
  LIMIT 1
)
GROUP BY users.Id;

SELECT 
  COUNT(posts.OwnerUserId) AS post_count, 
  COUNT(comments.UserId) AS comment_count
FROM users
LEFT JOIN posts ON posts.OwnerUserId = users.Id
LEFT JOIN comments ON comments.UserId = users.Id
WHERE users.Id = (
  SELECT Id 
  FROM users 
  ORDER BY CreationDate DESC 
  LIMIT 1
);
